scripts.cap:add:driver: cd capacitor-driver && npx cap add android
scripts.cap:add:student: cd capacitor-student && npx cap add android
scripts.cap:sync:driver: npm run build:driver && cd capacitor-driver && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:sync:driver:prod: npm run build:driver:prod && cd capacitor-driver && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:sync:student: npm run build:student && cd capacitor-student && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:sync:student:prod: npm run build:student:prod && cd capacitor-student && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:open:driver: cd capacitor-driver && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:open:student: cd capacitor-student && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:build:driver: npm run cap:sync:driver && npm run cap:open:driver
scripts.cap:build:driver:prod: npm run cap:sync:driver:prod && npm run cap:open:driver
scripts.cap:build:student: npm run cap:sync:student && npm run cap:open:student
scripts.cap:build:student:prod: npm run cap:sync:student:prod && npm run cap:open:student
scripts.apk:driver: npm run cap:sync:driver && cd capacitor-driver/android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && cp app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk ../../dist-driver.apk
scripts.apk:driver:prod: npm run cap:sync:driver:prod && cd capacitor-driver/android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && cp app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk ../../dist-driver-prod.apk
scripts.apk:student: npm run cap:sync:student && cd capacitor-student/android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && cp app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk ../../dist-student.apk
scripts.apk:student:prod: npm run cap:sync:student:prod && cd capacitor-student/android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && cp app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk ../../dist-student-prod.apk
